word: H8561 - תִּמֹּר - timmôr - tim-more' - Palm tree

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּמּרה תּמּר

Transliteration: timmôr timmôrâh

Phonetic: tim-more'

BDB Definition:

  1. palm tree figure (as ornament)

Origin: from the same root as H8558

TWOT entry: 2523c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
